name: reaudit
description: AI Search Visibility Platform — Track, optimize, and amplify your brand presence across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and 7 more AI engines. 182 tools: visibility scoring, raw verbatim AI engine responses, reverse citation lookup with per-engine source-type breakdown, entity authority scoring (Wikidata/Wikipedia/sameAs knowledge graph), ChatGPT (Bing-grounding) eligibility checks, free AI-bot crawlability checks (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot), AI agent readiness scanning, competitor content radar, reusable agent skills, prompt tracking and management (create topics, add and delete prompts), GEO content generation with answer-shape scoring, AI Commerce Shopping visibility via Google Merchant Center (competitive share of voice, product feed health), paid intelligence with multi-platform ad campaigns (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, X, and ChatGPT Ads on OpenAI), Adthena-style ChatGPT competitor ad intelligence, CRO with funnel analysis and A/B testing, revenue attribution, Reddit lead monitoring, Bing Webmaster, GitHub auto-fix pull requests, and interactive MCP App visualizations.
